segments.text: It was a whiff throw, but Amemame read even that!
segments.original_text: すかし投げだったんですけどそれすらも読んでいた雨飴選手

segments.text: Bair into reverse weak - executed perfectly!
segments.original_text: 空後ろ、空後反転弱を見事

segments.text: After the ledge grab, he's shutting down every option...
segments.original_text: 崖ついた後はすべてしっかりと拒否をしながら

full_text: It was a whiff throw, but Amemame read even that! Bair into reverse weak - executed perfectly! After the ledge grab, he's shutting down every option...
